name: 2026-05-29 Political Commentary Pork Barrel Rebrand TH
description:
Pork barrel never died. It just got renamed.

PDAF. DAP. Confidential funds. Now the Senate's flood control probe names "allocables," "leadership funds," "insertions."

Different labels. Same machine. Same envelope. Same hand on the cap.

Bagong pangalan. Lumang sistema.

Every cycle, a new vocabulary. Every cycle, the same audience pays.
